allow: PowerShell(Set-Location 'd:\\ifleon\\ifleonsite - 3d illsturators'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\('d:\\ifleon\\ifleonsite - 3d illsturators\\', ''\) } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(Set-Location 'd:\\ifleon\\ifleonsite - 3d illsturators'; @\(Get-ChildItem -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem -Directory -Exclude node_modules,.git,.next,.output | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "[$\($_.Name\)/]"; Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.Name\)" } }\) | ForEach-Object { $_ })

PowerShell(Set-Location 'd:\\ifleon\\ifleonsite - 3d illsturators\\src'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Exclude node_modules | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\('d:\\ifleon\\ifleonsite - 3d illsturators\\src\\', ''\) } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell($php = Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $composer = Get-Command composer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($php\) { Write-Host "PHP found at: $\($php.Source\)"; php -v } else { Write-Host "PHP: NOT FOUND in PATH" }; Write-Host "---"; if \($composer\) { Write-Host "Composer found at: $\($composer.Source\)"; composer --version } else { Write-Host "Composer: NOT FOUND in PATH" })
PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\laragon", "C:\\xampp", "C:\\wamp64", "C:\\wamp", "C:\\Program Files\\PHP", "C:\\php"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $p" } })

PowerShell($winget = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($winget\) { Write-Host "winget available: $\($winget.Source\)"; winget --version } else { Write-Host "winget NOT available" })

PowerShell($tinkerCmd = "App\\Models\\User::updateOrCreate\(['email'=>'admin@local.test'], ['name'=>'Admin', 'password'=>bcrypt\('password'\)]\); echo 'User created: admin@local.test / password' . PHP_EOL;"; php artisan tinker --execute=$tinkerCmd)
